name: Astral Vangard
short_description: Pilot your Vangard and battling against various enemies and bosses. Astral Vangard is a casual game with rogue-like elements in a futuristic world filled with Mecha. You can choose their own Vangard with different start weapon and characteristics, improving their abilities as they advance.
detailed_description:
Take command, pilot your Vangard
Battling against various enemies and bosses,navigate through levels with procedurally generated enemies.

Astral Vangard is a casual game with rogue-like elements in a futuristic world filled with mechanized robots (Mecha), collecting resources to upgrade Vangard, and enhance your hanagr, forge new weapons that will help you overcome great challenges.

You can choose their own Vangard with different start weapon and characteristics, improve their skills as they progress through the level becoming stronger and stronger.

"Protect the galaxy from those who want to conquer it, the Astral Vangard are the elite, charged with protecting against these enemy threats."


New version 1.00:

A new game mode has been introduced, the "Challenge Operation". These are special operations that start at level 1, once the current level is completed a next level will unlock and the enemies will be increasingly stronger. Each level will be completely random with a random map and enemies so to have a lot of variety even by choosing the same operation you will be able to find a different map and enemies and even the boss. The Challenge Operation is unlocked once the Normal Operations are completed. Test yourself in this new mode and face increasingly stronger enemies, how many operations can you complete? Beat your record and unlock the next level.

New Map Tylos and the new mode, new enemies have been introduced that you will find in the Challenge Operation.
